---
title: "Explainable Machine-Learning for identifying the genetic biomarker MGMT in brain tumors using magnetic resonance imaging radiomics"
author: "Ponce, S.; Chabert, S.; Mayeta, L.; Franco, P.; Plaza-Vega, F.; Querales, M.; Salas, R."
date: '2024-07-01'
date-format: "YYYY"
slug: mgmt-radiomics-explainable-ml
categories:
  - Investigación
  - Machine Learning
  - Radiomics
  - Salud
description: "Uso de aprendizaje automático explicable y radiomics para identificar el biomarcador genético MGMT en tumores cerebrales."
image: cover.png
lang: es
format:
  html:
    image: cover.png
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Figura representativa:** reemplazar `cover.png` por una figura del artículo o subir material complementario a `figures/`.
:::

## Cita

Ponce, S., Chabert, S., Mayeta, L., Franco, P., Plaza-Vega, F., Querales, M., & Salas, R. (2024). Explainable Machine-Learning for identifying the genetic biomarker MGMT in brain tumors using magnetic resonance imaging radiomics. In *2024 14th International Conference on Pattern Recognition Systems (ICPRS)* (pp. 1-6). IEEE.
